name: Johnson School Bus Kewaskum
owner_or_parent: Landmark Student Transportation (Aurora, Ontario; U.S. HQ Dousman, WI)
principals: Steven C. Johnson (President, legacy), Dan Johnson (GM), Judy Holzmann (legacy 3rd-gen owners pre-sale)
recent_news: Acquired ~Feb 2020 by Canadian strategic Landmark Student Transportation after 77 years of Johnson family ownership; Landmark retained Johnson Bus name and staff across 11 WI locations and ~450 buses.
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target. Already owned by strategic consolidator Landmark Student Transportation since 2020; Kewaskum is just one of ~11 branded WI locations under Landmark. Track as competitive landscape, not target.

name: Inter-County Bus Corp
owner_or_parent: Affiliated with Babylon Transit Inc.; school-bus sister at same yard is Educational Bus Transportation (EBT) which is part of The Trans Group consolidator
principals: Jim Smith Sr. (legacy owner, d. Dec 2007); current ownership not publicly identified
districts_or_customers: Historically casino/excursion runs from Babylon Village to NJ/CT casinos; shares Babylon yard with EBT (Trans Group) school bus ops
recent_news: Long-time motorcoach operator (since ~1922) on Deer Park Ave, Babylon; founder/owner Jim Smith Sr. died Dec 2007; the co-located school-bus operation at the same Babylon yard is Educational Bus Transportation, part of The Trans Group (strategic consolidator).
fit_notes: Likely NOT a fit. Inter-County itself appears to be a charter/casino motorcoach line (not yellow school bus); the actual yellow-bus operation at the Babylon yard is EBT under The Trans Group, a strategic. Rank target only if independent yellow-bus operations are confirmed separately.

name: Board Our Bus
owner_or_parent: Charter-bus brokerage / event-transport business; domain ridebob.com now redirects to Avalon Bus (Sacramento, CA)
principals: 'Bob' (co-owner, 35-yr travel/transport entrepreneur) and Joanne (majority owner, former college professor) per legacy site copy
districts_or_customers: Major events nationwide: EDC, Coachella, SnowGlobe, PGA TOUR, NFL Super Bowls; no Maine K-12 districts identified
recent_news: Website ridebob.com is non-functional and 301-redirects to Avalon Bus (Sacramento) as of 2026, suggesting the brand is dormant or absorbed; historically a national charter broker, not a Maine school-bus contractor.
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target. Appears to be an event/charter-bus broker (not a yellow-school-bus contractor), with no evidence of Maine district contracts. PO Box-only Portland address + dormant/redirecting website suggest brand has wound down or is not an operating school-bus carrier.

name: Taylor International Bus Corp
districts_or_customers: Broome County / Greater Binghamton area (presumed; not confirmed)
recent_news: No public web presence, news coverage, NYSED/NYSDOT directory hits, or website identified for 'Taylor International Bus Corp' at PO Box 3064 Binghamton; multiple searches returned only unrelated Taylor-named bus entities (Taylor Bus in KY, Taylor School District in MI).
fit_notes: Cannot confirm independent-operator status from public sources. PO-box-only address with no website/phone is consistent with either a very small family operator or a dormant/shell entity. Recommend direct outreach via NYSED pupil-transportation directory and Broome County districts before scoring; not actionable as a target without primary verification.

name: Lasalle Bus Svc Inc
owner_or_parent: Former subsidiary of Jofaz Transportation Inc. (Fazzia family, Brooklyn); shared 1 Coffey St yard now operated as Jofaz Transportation
principals: Joseph Fazzia (Jofaz family, historic owner of the Coffey St yard)
districts_or_customers: NYC DOE school bus routes (historical, via Jofaz family of companies)
recent_news: Lasalle Bus Service Inc. is listed as a FORMER subsidiary of Jofaz Transportation; the 1 Coffey St, Brooklyn address is now Jofaz Transportation (current Jofaz subsidiaries: Y&M Bus Corp and Third Avenue Transit). Jofaz/Y&M faced 2022 NYAG anti-idling suit and 2020 FBI mob-union allegations against ownership.
fit_notes: NOT an independent tuck-in target. Lasalle is a former Jofaz/Fazzia-family subsidiary at the Coffey St yard now operated by Jofaz Transportation. Even if shell remains, it sits under the Jofaz family umbrella with legal/regulatory baggage (NYAG suit, FBI/labor allegations) that would likely fail Summit's diligence screen.
